textByHash.0133f02417576fa083b0f2ac671ab950763ef7c3: Why wouldn't I be? The Council are nothing but trouble.
textByHash.04d5938ea0ee692d4bfddcbbdb32e89f37471414: That was close! Are you okay human?
textByHash.24258c7111cd8e7eee594acc1969eb636b38292d: Any other day you'd be wasting your time, but today you're in luck. Due to the protests, Councillor Unkar has been staying at the castle for safety. I've had a chance to go through his private documents.
textByHash.2fdebbf25a7f517d0981adebbcf5fe7a84755257: Never have truer words been spoken. Martin sent you, right? I wasn't sure if anyone would come after he got arrested.
textByHash.62c7e8d882387e5b5de6e09a666bedd12acccc76: Maybe you should go and lie down.
textByHash.6456fa7ba482ef0a4c58cd6b5a48c4b2ac2862c1: Lady Lovakengj is in charge of Lovakengj, not the Council. Sure, Councillor Unkar might act like he plays a big part, but it's all empty words.
textByHash.7b1dea393ae18d5841aa822f42352de51ba360a1: That's right. What brings you here, human?
textByHash.87c84c3caf75705c76b4bc64bd4e8ea635ff8c01: You have what you need human. Now I need to get back to Lovakengj.
textByHash.9898774fd3f223e544185a109547579cb81f90b8: Martin warned me this would happen. The Council are trying to silence us!
textByHash.c0da45a449d0d16a10bce553cfba8e864f213b4e: It's not safe for me here. I need to get back to Lovakengj. Here, this should hopefully give you what you need.
textByHash.da94f8e6e468d5eea632c4f18cb77fd9fb87f360: Can't stop to talk human. Lady Lovakengj might need me.
textByHash.f5ce6dd13a7b011edcc2c07b42a2fe9d029ed207: Not really. It's not like it's a hard job. Councillor Unkar would see us all work to death in the mines instead.
